visual_design.purpose: character sheets, monster silhouettes, background/keyframe references

shot_animation.purpose: shot-level motion, camera moves, I2V refinements, HTML-to-video rendering

audio.purpose: temp ambience, impacts, rhythm bed, later voice and music replacement

edit.purpose: multi-video stitching, captions, versioning, final sample delivery

review.purpose: continuity, rating risk, originality, product readiness checks

credential_policy: External generators are optional. If API keys are absent, the local deterministic renderer remains the production fallback.
